历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum ranking for Central China Normal University in Gansu Physics Category was approximately 6240 in 2024, dropping to about 8013 in 2025, a decline of about 1773 positions in one year, a significant decrease. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 8013; the enrollment plan for this university in Gansu Physics Category went from 6 students in 2024 to 5 in 2025, and then a substantial expansion to 33 students in 2026, an increase of 560%, the largest expansion in recent years, which will significantly lower the ranking threshold.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Central China Normal University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, ranking approximately 53rd in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, stable around 50th in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of ministry-affiliated normal universities; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is somewhat positive, mainly due to the lifelong learning positive event of an 81-year-old doctoral graduate; Douyin popularity ranking is 89th, evaluated as average, overall attention is stable, with no obvious negative public opinion; Education A+ (top in the country), Chinese History A-, Psychology A-, Political Science A-, Marxist Theory A-, a total of 5 A- and above disciplines, with outstanding strength in normal disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, Electronic Information/Communication majors are highly recommended socially; Normal/Education majors are differentiated and wait-and-see. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Gansu Province general college entrance examination is approximately 218,700, an increase from the estimated 121,443 Physics Category candidates in 2025 to about 147,710, an increase of about 21.6%, intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline of 8013, the 2026 Physics Category plan surging from 5 to 33 students (560% expansion), the increase of about 21.6% in provincial Physics Category candidates, and the somewhat positive university reputation, the expansion effect far exceeds the candidate increase, and the minimum admission ranking is expected to drop significantly; the predicted minimum ranking is about 34,737, with a range of 34,237–35,237.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, Physics Category significantly expands to 33 students, with a ranking range of approximately 34,237–35,237. It is recommended that candidates within this ranking range use Tier 2 majors as the main choice, Tier 1 majors for a sprint, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net; candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<34,237) can focus on sprinting for popular majors such as Computer Class and Electronic Information Class.

历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum ranking of Central China Normal University in Gansu for liberal arts/history category was approximately 1285th in 2021, dropping to about 1448th in 2025, showing an overall backward trend with a cumulative shift of about 163 places over the past 4 years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 1448th; the enrollment plan for history category in Gansu increased from 4 students in 2021 to 5 in 2025, and further expanded to 10 in 2026, a 100% increase, the largest expansion in recent years, which will significantly lower the ranking threshold.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Central China Normal University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, ranking approximately 53rd in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, belonging to the upper-middle level of ministry-affiliated normal universities; its reputation evaluation for 2026 is slightly positive, mainly due to the positive event of an 81-year-old doctoral graduate; Douyin popularity ranking is 89th, evaluated as average, with overall attention stable; Education A+ (top in China), Chinese History A-, Psychology A-, Political Science A-, Marxist Theory A-, providing direct support for enrollment majors such as History and Political Science.
